title: PET ADOPTION ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: UMPQUA VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY RESOURCE CENTER PET ADOPTION ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides help connecting people who need to relinquish a dog with people who want to adopt. Does not operate a shelter but works to rehome dogs. Dogs will be spayed/neutered (if not already) at the agency's expense before going to a new home. PO Box 651 Winchester, OR 97495 Eligibility: Some larger and specific breeds may not be accepted Hours: 24 hours a day / 7 days a week Email (541) 672-5039 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 672-5039 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Call for information -Leave a message if no answer with name, phone number, and pet need. Speak slowly and clearly. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Douglas County Services: Animal Adoption Other Services Offered At This Location: DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - PET FOOD DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - SPAY/NEUTER/EMERGENCY MEDICAL ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UMPQUA VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY RESOURCE CENTER
